segments.text: He sees it and doesn't commit; backing off with a jump
segments.original_text: 見たら動かん、ジャンプで身を引いていく

segments.text: Not respecting the forward tilt pressure
segments.original_text: 横強を固めにはつき合わず
空中上から崖狩り展開
なりふりはもちろんシールドから

segments.text: Building damage with the big moves
segments.original_text: エイハでダメージ飛ばして

segments.text: Shuts down the approach, back to edgeguarding
segments.original_text: ガンで止めてからまたも崖

segments.text: Denying the ledge drop airdodge getup
segments.original_text: 崖離しジャンプ回避許さず
プレッシャーをかけることによって

segments.text: Chipping away at the meter, but
Rolling in close, up tilt connects!
segments.original_text: ここで内側を転がり上強が通る
ルーラで戻っていくものの

segments.text: The meter is already running low
And the pressure just keeps mounting
They're reading that teleport so well
segments.original_text: しっかりとルーラを見越しているんでしょう

segments.text: Setting up the grab at the landing
segments.original_text: 着地点につかみを置いて
ミスらないコンボ完走

full_text: He sees it and doesn't commit; backing off with a jump. Not respecting the forward tilt pressure. Ledge trap off up air! Classic out of shield approach. Nair into the rapid hits. Building damage with the big moves. Shuts down the approach, back to edgeguarding. Denying the ledge drop airdodge getup. The recovery phase unfolds. By applying this constant pressure. Chipping away at the meter, but. Rolling in close, up tilt connects! Teleporting back out, but. The meter is already running low. And the pressure just keeps mounting. They're reading that teleport so well. Setting up the grab at the landing. Fair, down, up air. Cleans up the combo!

corrections.original: ミラドーマンジャンプ
corrections.corrected: 見たら動かん、ジャンプ

corrections.original: レーダーを見越している
corrections.corrected: ルーラを見越している
